items.title: Rosenior was out of his depth at Chelsea, and it was obvious from the start
items.summary: Liam Rosenior never had the aura of a Chelsea manager, but the club hired him anyway. Four months later, the Blues are looking for another new coach.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: All eyes on Dhoni and Rohit as IPL's defining rivalry returns
items.summary: It's CSK vs MI again, but both teams have been far from their best in recent years and find themselves at a crossroads
